titles.title: There’s a name to call named Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There’s a name to call named Jesus There’s a way to go named Jesus There’s a life to live named Jesus He is love, He is love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He was dead and now he is alive And I’m in him, and I’m in him. And he raised up the dead out of the grave. So I am saved, so I am saved.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There’s a hope to hope named Jesus There’s a light to shine named Jesus There’s a pow’r to work named Jesus He is love, He is love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There’s a king who comes named Jesus Let us glorify our king Jesus All the world will serve king Jesus He is Lord, he is Lord!
